docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRIAN TRACY. DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NADIA REYNAGA-MORENO, LEGAL SUPPORT LEAD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TRACEY, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
